approve_date.text: วันที่อนุมัติ

ref_own_no.text: เลขทะเบียน

book_no.text: ที่ สอ.กปน.ว.

book_date.text: วันที่ออกหนังสือ

root.sql:
select (select coop_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as coop_name ,(select manager_name from sc_cnt_m_coop) as manager_name
,'!book_no_1!' as book_no ,'!day_in!' as day_in ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date, 'SD') as sys_tdate_day ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date, 'MONTH') as sys_tdate_month ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(current_date, 'YYYY') as sys_tdate_year ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate( '!book_date_1!' , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as book_date_tdate
,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( vr_resign_coll.membership_no ) as member_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( vr_resign_coll.ref_own_no ) as coll_name ,pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(vr_resign_coll.begining_of_contract , 'SD MONTH YYYY') as begining_of_contract_tdate ,pka_com_function.fp_get_moneythai ((vr_resign_coll.loan_approve_amount)::double precision) as thai_loan_approve_amount ,to_snumber((vr_resign_coll.loan_approve_amount)::bigint) as snu_loan_approve_amount ,vr_resign_coll.* from vr_resign_coll where 1=1 /*WHERE*/ --and approve_date between '1/6/2024' and '30/6/2024'
